clients_company_type_check.name: clients_company_type_check
clients_company_type_check.value: company_type IS NULL OR company_type IN ('architect_firm', 'contractor', 'homeowner', 'engineer', 'developer', 'other')

idx_invitations_token.name: idx_invitations_token
idx_invitations_token.where: accepted_at IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

workflows_template_org_check.name: workflows_template_org_check
workflows_template_org_check.value: (is_system_template = true AND org_id IS NULL) OR (is_system_template = false AND org_id IS NOT NULL)
